prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild hall, warm wood interior. Ren Dawncrest, an androgynous mage in blue robes with floating spell tags, stands near the quest board. Ren Mistfell, a feminine crafter in an apron with a tool belt, stands opposite. Dawncrest presents a sealed quest parcel to Mistfell with both hands, visible handoff motion, lively guild background, cinematic lighting, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous guild hall shot. Ren Mistfell accepts the sealed quest parcel from Ren Dawncrest. Both characters bow slightly to each other in mutual respect, completing the handoff. Consistent character appearance and warm anime RPG lighting, no text, no watermark.
